testcase.name: test_patch_add_division_to_single_rejected
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:978: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:340: in decode raise JSONDecodeError("Extra data", s, end) E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Extra data: line 1 column 5 (char 4)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_iteration2_clients_recon.py:74: in test_patch_add_division_to_single_rejected single = next(c for c in r.json()["clients"] if c["name"] == "TEST_Single_Co") ^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:982: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Extra data: line 1 column 5 (char 4)

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_iteration2_clients_recon.py:84: in test_patch_add_division_to_multi multi = next(c for c in r.json()["clients"] if c["name"] == "TEST_Multi_Co") ^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:982: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Extra data: line 1 column 5 (char 4)
